title: pronephrium euryphyllum
intro: Pronephrium euryphyllum, also known as the Euryphyllum fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Marattiaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Pronephrium euryphyllum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
